do_if.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and $target.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: $target.commander? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: $target.allsubordinates? and @$target.allsubordinates.count gt 0 and $target.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

$target.defaultorder? and @$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target.commander}? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: not $commander? or not $commander.exists or not $commander.allsubordinates? or @$commander.allsubordinates.count lt 1

show_notification.text: '[GT] Redistribute Pilots unavailable: no eligible subordinates found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] Requested for commander ' + $commander.idcode + ' with ' + @$commander.allsubordinates.count + ' subordinates'

do_if.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and $ship.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.defaultorder.id} or (@$ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: $ship.commander? and $ship.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

$ship.commander? and $ship.commander.exists and $ship.commander.defaultorder? and ((@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply') or (@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and (@$ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or @$ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply')))

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Custom Blacklist Owner', $Status = if $mk3BlacklistApplies then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = $mk3BlacklistOwnerDetail]

set_value.name: $bfName
set_value.exact: if $bf? and $bf.name? and $bf.name != '' then $bf.name else 'Unknown Faction'

set_value.name: $bfShort
set_value.exact: if $bf? and $bf.shortname? and $bf.shortname != '' then $bf.shortname else (if $bf? and $bf.id? and $bf.id != '' then $bf.id else '')

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Custom Blacklist Active', $Status = if not $mk3BlacklistApplies then 'INFO' else if $mk3BlacklistActive then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = if not $mk3BlacklistApplies then 'No (not an MK3/MK4 ship)' else if $mk3BlacklistActive then ('Yes (' + $mk3BlockedCount + ' factions blocked)') else 'No']

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is in a blacklisted or dangerous sector and is actively trying to leave. No trades will be searched until the ship reaches a safe sector.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship trade destination was threatened or blacklisted. Ship is searching for an alternative route or cancelling the current trade.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has cargo from a previous session or order. It must sell all existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades. The ship is looking for the best buyer for its current cargo.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is damaged and heading to a shipyard or equipment dock for repairs. Trading is paused until repairs are complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is actively running the GalaxyTrader order. It is either searching for trades, executing a trade (buying/selling), or waiting for a work unit from the scheduler.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is currently executing a trade order (buying or selling at a station). This is a sub-order created by GalaxyTrader.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is resupplying (ammunition, deployables, etc.) at a station. Trading resumes after resupply is complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has an active repair order. It is heading to or being repaired at a shipyard/equipment dock.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is docked at a station or waiting. This may indicate it is waiting for docking clearance or between trade cycles.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is flying to a destination zone. It may be heading to a buy or sell station.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is executing a non-GT order (' + $activeOrderId + '). This order may have been queued externally or by another mod.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has no active order. It may be waiting for the default order to kick in, or the GT order may not be properly assigned.'

set_value.name: $pipelineDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is using the normal search pipeline with standard price ranges and full search radius.'

set_value.name: $pipelineDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is isolated (all connected sectors blacklisted or unreachable). Using isolated price ranges (no filter) and searching only within current sector.'

set_value.name: $pipelineDesc
set_value.exact: 'Normal search found no trades. Fallback active: searching near ship position with reduced radius (1/3 of normal), relaxed profit thresholds (ROI halved, min 100 Cr), and fallback price ranges. Trades still limited to home sector max distance.'

do_if.value: $ship.pilot and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and ($diagXPBlocked or $diagMustTrain or ($diagBlockedLevel gt 1))

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Active Price Range', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Sell max: ' + ($activeSellPriceMax * 100) + '%, Buy min: ' + ($activeBuyPriceMin * 100) + '%']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Note', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Sectors on Sector Whitelist (Config) are exempt from blacklist and show as Not blacklisted.']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Remaining Sectors', $Status = if $remainingCount gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $remainingCount]

do_if.value: $ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: $routeCacheReason
set_value.exact: 'No stored jump path cache (pilot level ' + $routeCachePilotLevel + ' < 12; cache logic inactive)'

set_value.name: $routeCacheReason
set_value.exact: 'No stored jump path cache yet (eligible; cache populates on sector-change route evaluation)'

set_value.name: $currentBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (activity + travel) - ship cannot trade here and should not travel through this sector'

set_value.name: $currentBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (activity only) - ship cannot trade here but may travel through'

set_value.name: $currentBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (travel only) - ship should not travel through this sector'

set_value.name: $homeBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (activity + travel) - trade search from home sector is severely limited'

set_value.name: $homeBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (activity) - no trades will originate from home sector stations'

set_value.name: $homeBLStatus
set_value.exact: 'BLACKLISTED (travel) - ships may not route through home sector'

set_value.name: $isolatedDesc
set_value.exact: 'ISOLATED - All ' + $connectedCount + ' connected sectors are blacklisted. Ship can only trade within its current sector.'

append_to_list.name: $sec2.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Snapshot', $Status = $diagStatus, $Detail = if $diagStatus == 'PASS' then 'Available' else 'No live miner snapshot received yet']

do_if.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and $ship.commander.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Min Player Money', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + ($minPlayerMoney / 100) + ' Cr (ships idle below this)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Max Buy Distance', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $maxBuy + ' jumps (order: ' + $rawMaxBuy + ', pilot cap: ' + $pilotMaxJumps + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Max Sell Distance', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $maxSell + ' jumps (order: ' + $rawMaxSell + ', pilot cap: ' + $pilotMaxJumps + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Effective Max Distance', $Status = if $maxDistance gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $maxDistance + ' jumps (max of buy/sell)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Search Distance', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $diagSearchDistance + ' jumps' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then ' (miner sell range)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Use Min Cargo Threshold', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $useMinCargoThreshold then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Illegal Route Filter', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $enforceRouteIllegalLegality then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ignore Trade Rules', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $ignoreTradeRules then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ignore MK1 Supply', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $ignoreMK1Supply then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ignore Build Storage', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $ignoreBuildStorage then 'true' else 'false']

set_value.name: $diagMk4HomeSector
set_value.exact: if $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and $diagMk4HomeAnchor.isclass.sector then $diagMk4HomeAnchor else (if $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and $diagMk4HomeAnchor.sector? then @$diagMk4HomeAnchor.sector else $homeSector)

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Customer Must Be Player', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk4CustomerMustBePlayer then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Supplier Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'player=' + (if $diagMk4AllowPlayerSuppliers then 'on' else 'off') + ', faction=' + (if $diagMk4AllowAiSuppliers then 'on' else 'off')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Serve Home Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk4DedicatedServe then ('true (home=' + (if $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and $diagMk4HomeAnchor.exists then @$diagMk4HomeAnchor.knownname else 'unknown') + ')') else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Execution Policy Snapshot', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'pairView=executable-only, priceCap=source<=customer, demandGate=vanillaRes+gtInFlight(global), ignoreTradeRules=faction-access-only']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Manual Basket Active', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No (Auto Wares is ON; manual basket is ignored at runtime)']

set_value.name: $sectorWhitelistDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $swCount + ' sectors exempt' + (if $swNames != '' then ': ' + $swNames + (if $swCount gt 8 then ', ...' else '') else '')

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Station', $Status = if $mk1HomeStation == 'Not set' then 'FAIL' else 'PASS', $Detail = $mk1HomeStation]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Supply Mode', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $mk1Supply then 'On (also buys resources)' else 'Off']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'WARE_SNAPSHOT*', $Status = if $mk1WareSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 cycle snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1WareSnapshotSig]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'SELL_OFFER_SNAPSHOT', $Status = if $mk1SellOfferSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 cycle snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1SellOfferSnapshotSig]

set_value.name: $mk1rtDestName
set_value.exact: if $mk1rt? and $mk1rt.buyer? and $mk1rt.buyer.exists and $mk1rt.buyer.knownname? then @$mk1rt.buyer.knownname else '?'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'ROUTE_PLAN', $Status = if $mk1RoutePlanSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 route plan snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1RoutePlanSnapshotSig]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Stations', $Status = if $mk2SourceCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2SourceCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Destination Stations', $Status = if $mk2DestCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2DestCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Anchor', $Status = if $minerHome == 'Not set' then 'FAIL' else 'PASS', $Detail = $minerHome]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Player Stations Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $minerPlayerOnly then 'true' else 'false']

set_value.name: $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail
set_value.exact: 'none (no mineable cargo and no active mining ware snapshot)'

do_if.value: $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homeStation? and $gtOrder.$homeStation.exists and $gtOrder.$homeStation.isoperational and ((not $diagMinerPlayerStationsOnly) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.owner == $ship.owner)) and ((not $gtOrder.$homeSector?) or (not $gtOrder.$homeSector.exists) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.sector == $gtOrder.$homeSector)) and not $diagMinerPrimaryStations.indexof.{$gtOrder.$homeStation}

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Primary mode: only primary stations below ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% target fill'

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Overflow mode: fallback disabled, no additional sell targets allowed'

do_if.value: $mWare? and $mWare.hastag.minable and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.count gt 0 and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.max gt 0 and not $diagMinerOfferWares.indexof.{$mWare}

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Sell Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Primary Stations', $Status = if $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count + ' stations']

set_value.name: $procLockDetail
set_value.exact: 'Cache active: ' + $cacheActive + '/' + $cacheMax + ' | Live active: ' + $liveActive + '/' + $liveMax + ' | MK4 live active: ' + $mk4LiveActive + '/' + $mk4LiveMax

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Exists', $Status = if $cacheExists then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries']

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'N/A (no cache max-distance metadata yet) — ship needs: ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'Cache max distance metadata: ' + $cacheMaxDist + ' jumps; ship needs ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Expired Entries (>600s)', $Status = if $expiredCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $expiredCount + ' / ' + [20, $cacheEntryCount].min]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship In FailedShips', $Status = if $failedShipCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedShipCount + ' entries have this ship in FailedShips']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Miner Offer Ware Scope', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

do_elseif.value: $ignoreCarrierAux and (($buyStation.isclass.ship and ($buyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $buyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($sellStation.isclass.ship and ($sellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $sellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)))

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount + (if $pairCount gt $maxPairs then ' (capped at ' + $maxPairs + ')' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Pairs Passing All Checks', $Status = if $passCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $passCount + ' / ' + $pairCount]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Best Passing Pair', $Status = if $passCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = $bestDiagPairDesc]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = if $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' then 'MK4 Price Cap Exceeded (source gt customer buy)' else 'No Profit (sell le buy)', $Status = if $rejectNoProfit gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectNoProfit]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below Profit Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowThreshold gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowThreshold]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below ROI Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowROI gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowROI]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Not Operational', $Status = if $rejectNotOperational gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectNotOperational]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Docking Denied', $Status = if $rejectDocking gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectDocking]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Dock Size Incompatible', $Status = if $rejectDockSize gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectDockSize]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Zero Amount', $Status = if $rejectZeroAmount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectZeroAmount]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cant Afford', $Status = if $rejectCantAfford gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCantAfford]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Path Blocked', $Status = if $rejectPathBlocked gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectPathBlocked]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK1 Supply Excluded', $Status = if $rejectMK1Supply gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK1Supply]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ware Basket Excluded', $Status = if $rejectWareBasket gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectWareBasket + (if $diagPairWareFilterActive then ' (manual basket active)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Build Storage Excluded', $Status = if $rejectBuildStorage gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBuildStorage]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Carrier/Aux Excluded', $Status = if $rejectCarrierAux gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCarrierAux]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Foreign Customer Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4ForeignCustomer gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4ForeignCustomer]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Supplier Policy Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4SupplierPolicy gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4SupplierPolicy]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Serve-Home Scope Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4ServeHomeScope gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4ServeHomeScope]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Demand Reserved Exhausted', $Status = if $rejectMK4DemandReservedExhausted gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4DemandReservedExhausted]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Illegal Ware', $Status = if $rejectIllegal gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectIllegal]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo Incompatible', $Status = if $rejectCargoType gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCargoType]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo Utilization Below Min', $Status = if $rejectCargoUtil gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCargoUtil + (if $diagIsolatedForCargoFilter then ' (ignored in isolated mode)' else '')]

set_value.name: $sec8b.$Name
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'Miner Sell Offer Details' else 'Pair Details'

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sell Offers Passing Policy', $Status = if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' offers']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Search Sectors', $Status = if $searchSectors.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

set_value.name: $mAmount
set_value.exact: if $mOffer? and $mOffer.offeramount? and $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship}? then $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship} else (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.amount? then $mOffer.amount else 0)

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = if $mOffer? and $mOffer.ware? then $mOffer.ware.name else 'UNKNOWN', $Status = 'PASS', $Detail = $mStationText, $Col4 = '' + (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.unitprice? then ($mOffer.unitprice / 100) else 0) + 'Cr', $Col5 = '' + $mAmount + ' units', $Col6 = '']

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No sell opportunities found with current miner policy.'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No search sectors resolved (home sector/anchor unavailable for diagnose).'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No diagnose wares available (no mineable cargo and no active miner ware snapshot).'

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Hint', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'See Clearance section for per-sector/per-station rejection details.' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount + ' scanned, ' + $pairDetails.count + ' shown (' + $passCount + ' PASS' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' and $diagShowExecutableOnly then ', executable-only view' else ', ' + ($pairCount - $passCount) + ' FAIL') + ')']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Mode', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Ship has cargo (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + ' used). In clearance mode, the ship must sell ALL existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades.']

do_if.value: $clVerdict == 'PASS' and $ignoreCarrierAux and $clStation.isclass.ship and ($clStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $clStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)

set_value.name: $clReason
set_value.exact: 'ware is illegal to a faction (AllowIllegal: false)'

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Sector: ' + $clSector.knownname, $Col4 = '-', $Col5 = '-', $Col6 = 'No buy offers found in this sector for this ware (after current filters).']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name + ' Summary', $Status = $clWareResult, $Detail = '' + $clPassCount + ' viable buyers out of ' + $clBuyerCount + ' total offers found']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation #' + $ri, $Status = if $resShip == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $resShipName + (if $resShip == $ship then ' (THIS SHIP)' else ''), $Col4 = $resWareName, $Col5 = 'TTL=' + $resTTL + 's', $Col6 = 'Key=' + $resKey ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation Stats (Lifetime)', $Status = if ($rsCreated? and $rsCreated gt 0) then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = 'Created: ' + (if $rsCreated? then $rsCreated else 0) + ' | Cleared: ' + (if $rsCleared? then $rsCleared else 0) + ' | Expired: ' + (if $rsExpired? then $rsExpired else 0) + ' | Conflicts: ' + (if $rsConflicts? then $rsConflicts else 0) ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reservation Stats', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No stats available (system may not have initialized)']

set_value.name: $activeTradeSourceInfo
set_value.exact: 'fallback: current trade orders via global.$GT_Ships (' + global.$GT_Ships.keys.count + ' ships)'

do_if.value: $atrShip? and $atrShip.exists and $atrShip.isoperational and $atrShip.order? and (@$atrShip.order.id == 'TradePerform' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeBuy' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeSell')

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships With Active Trades', $Status = if $atrCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $atrCount]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Active Trade #' + $ai, $Status = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $atrDetail, $Col4 = $atrWareName, $Col5 = $atrEntry.$Source, $Col6 = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'THIS SHIP' else '' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships In Same Home Sector', $Status = if $sameHomeCount gt 5 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $sameHomeCount + ' (excl. this ship)']

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Failed Sector Pairs', $Status = if $failedPairsCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedPairsCount + ' (for current sector)']

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE: Ship is in clearance mode but has no cargo. This should not happen.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'This may be a state inconsistency — try reassigning the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (ILLEGAL CARGO): All ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers blocked because ware is illegal to a faction and AllowIllegal is disabled. Ship cannot sell its cargo and is stuck in an infinite retry loop.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal on this ship/commander to allow selling the cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Or: manually sell the cargo, then reassign the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO VIABLE BUYER): ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers found but all rejected. Ship cannot sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check the Clearance tab for specific rejection reasons per station.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance or review blacklist settings.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO BUYERS): No buy offers found for current cargo in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors within range.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance to expand search radius.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check if any stations in range buy these wares.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE OK: ' + $clTotalPass + ' viable buyers found out of ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' total. Ship should be able to sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If the ship is not selling, check scheduler state and queue.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: No home sector — ship cannot search for trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Assign ship to a commander or set a home sector'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'BLOCKED: Money gate — player funds too low (' + ($playerMoney / 100) + ' Cr lt ' + ($moneyGateThreshold / 100) + ' Cr threshold)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase player funds or lower MinPlayerMoney setting'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'BLOCKED: Global money cap active — fleet budget exhausted'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Earn more money to lift the money cap'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO OFFERS: ' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'No buy offers' else (if $allSellOffers.count == 0 then 'No sell offers' else 'No buy offers')) + ' found in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance to expand search radius'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO MATCHING PAIRS: Offers exist on both sides, but no tradable sell-buy pairs could be formed'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Most matches were same-station loops (' + $rejectSameStation + ' skipped) — this is intentionally ignored.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check ware overlap between sell and buy offers in Pair Details.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance or review blacklist constraints to expose more counterpart stations.'

set_value.name: $maxRejectName
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' then 'mk4_price_cap_exceeded (source price gt customer buy price)' else 'no_profit (sell price le buy price)'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'ALL REJECTED: 0/' + $pairCount + ' pairs passed. Dominant reason: ' + $maxRejectName + ' (' + $maxReject + ' pairs)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Some stations are not operational. Wait for production/storage recovery or pick other sectors.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal if you want to include illegal wares.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship cargo type cannot carry some wares. Limit ware basket or use suitable ship class.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower minimum cargo utilization target (current: ' + $effectiveCargoTarget + '%) or increase trade volume options (distance/wares).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Offer amount/cargo free/money limits reduce tradable amount to zero for many pairs.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review blacklist settings — some routes may be blocked'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'MK4 diagnose is in executable-only mode. Foreign-station routes are blocked by design and omitted from the Pair Details list.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review MK4 supplier policy (buyFromPlayer / buyFromFaction). Current policy excludes many suppliers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'serveHomeOnly is active: delivery must match home anchor (home station or home sector).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Demand is already covered by incoming reservations (vanilla + GT in-flight). Wait for execution/expiry or target different wares/stations.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship should be able to find trades. If it is not trading, check scheduler state and queue.'

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'exec-only pairs, priceCap source<=customer, demandGate vanillaRes+gtInFlight(global), ignoreTradeRules=faction-access-only']

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or not $ship.commander? or not $ship.commander.exists

show_notification.text: '[GT] Promote unavailable: no valid commander found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Promote] Requested for subordinate ' + $ship.idcode + ' under commander ' + $ship.commander.idcode
